news.headline: Office market set to rebound as work-from-home policies wane. Office building sales rose by 20% last year, with increased leasing activity.
news.summary: The past year saw a significant 20% increase in sales of office buildings, with leasing activity also on the rise. This surge in demand for office spaces comes as companies seek more room following the decrease in work-from-home arrangements.

news.headline: Steve Davis, Elon Musk’s trusted lieutenant, heads DOGE. Musk compares him to chemotherapy, overseeing  departments effectively.
news.summary: Steve Davis, a devoted supporter of Musk for many years, currently heads the Department of Government Efficiency. Musk has compared Davis to chemotherapy due to his impactful and essential role in the organization.

news.headline: Korean F&B franchise JS Holdings sees 30% productivity boost with AI platform Morningmate, revolutionizing operations.
news.summary: JS Holdings, based in Seoul, South Korea, has experienced a significant boost in operational efficiency, with a reported 30% increase after integrating Morningmate, a team collaboration platform powered by artificial intelligence.

news.headline: FDI World Dental Federation releases song to highlight link between oral health and mental well-being on WOHD; available on all streaming platforms.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Geneva, the FDI World Dental Federation (FDI) released a new song on all streaming platforms to mark World Oral Health Day (WOHD). This initiative aims to explore the impact of oral health on mental well-being. The song is intended to raise awareness globally about the importance of oral health.

news.headline: Oracle introduces AI Agent Studio for Fusion Cloud Apps, enabling creation, deployment, management of AI agents.
news.summary: In a recent announcement at Oracle CloudWorld in London on March 20, 2025, Oracle introduced the new Oracle AI Agent Studio. This innovative tool is designed to empower customers and partners using Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications by enabling them to efficiently create, extend, deploy, and manage AI agents and agent teams throughout their enterprises. The Oracle AI Agent Studio aims to enhance productivity and streamline operations by providing a platform for the seamless integration of artificial intelligence into business processes. This advancement signifies Oracle's commitment to driving technological innovation and supporting businesses in harnessing the power of AI.

news.headline: 50L Home Coalition and USGBC California, with partners like Electrolux, IKEA, Kohler, and P&G, reduce indoor water usage by 20%.
news.summary: USGBC California along with members of the 50 Liter Home Coalition including Electrolux Group, IKEA, Kohler, and Procter & Gamble, have unveiled a plan to promote water security and reduce carbon emissions. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on March 20, 2025, marking World Water Day. This initiative highlights the collective effort by industry leaders to address sustainable living practices.

news.headline: AEGEAN enhances passenger experience with Oracle Fusion Cloud CX, aiming to boost revenue and loyalty.
news.summary: AEGEAN, the leading Greek airline, has partnered with Oracle Fusion Cloud Customer Experience (CX) to enhance customer satisfaction, drive revenue growth, and improve customer retention. The collaboration was announced in London on March 20, 2025. By leveraging Oracle's advanced CX technology, AEGEAN aims to personalize traveler experiences, ultimately increasing revenue and fostering customer loyalty. The partnership with Oracle signifies a strategic move by the Greek flag carrier to prioritize customer-centric strategies.

news.headline: Oracle enhances employee engagement with new capabilities in Cloud HCM, fostering productivity and company culture.
news.summary: In recent updates to Oracle Cloud HCM, enhanced features empower HR teams, managers, and employees to boost engagement, productivity, and foster a stronger company culture. This was announced during Oracle CloudWorld in London on March 20, 2025. The new capabilities include improved employee communications and streamlined event management tools, adding significant value to the platform. These enhancements aim to drive positive outcomes within organizations by leveraging technology to improve staff engagement and overall performance.

news.headline: ION Commodities releases latest version of RightAngle S25, a CTRM solution for crude oil, refined products in liquid hydrocarbon market.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, ION Commodities launched the newest version of RightAngle, its primary commodities trading and risk management solution (CTRM) for crude oil, refined products, and natural resources. ION Commodities is a prominent worldwide supplier of energy and commodity management services. The updated software is designed to enhance trading efficiency and risk management strategies for businesses involved in the commodities market. No specific details were provided regarding the changes or upgrades in this latest release.

news.headline: Oracle introduces Exadata Database Service on Exascale infrastructure with Azure; Oracle Base Database Service soon to come.
news.summary: Today, in Austin, Texas on March 20, 2025, Oracle unveiled the launch of the Oracle Exadata Database Service on Exascale Infrastructure. This service is now officially accessible to customers. Additionally, Oracle also shared plans for the upcoming release of the Oracle Base Database Service on Oracle Database@Azure. This expansion aims to bring a new array of services to users on the Azure platform.

news.headline: Four Nigerian governors and Nnamdi Ekeh to receive FIN-Forbes Awards at 2025 Renewable Energy Roundtable in Dubai on April 9, 2025.
news.summary: Lagos, Nigeria - March 20, 2025 - The upcoming 2025 Annual FIN-Forbes Renewable Energy Leadership Roundtable and Awards, organized by the Foreign Investment Network (FIN), is generating buzz. The event is slated to take place on April 9, 2025, at the renowned Marriott Hotel Al Jaddaf in Dubai. This gathering aims to recognize outstanding contributions in the renewable energy sector. Attendees can expect insightful discussions and the celebration of leading figures in the industry.

news.headline: Dr. Ofer Daphna to present keynote lecture at World Cornea Congress 2025, organized by EyeYon Medical in Israel.
news.summary: In a press release dated March 20, 2025, EyeYon Medical, based in NES ZIONA, Israel, a prominent provider of advanced corneal implant technologies, shared that Dr. Ofer Daphna, the innovator behind EndoArt®, has been selected to present a keynote address at the esteemed World Cornea Congress (WCC) 2025. Dr. Daphna's lecture at this renowned event highlights the significance of his contribution to the field.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: ECB policy is meaningfully less restrictive than before.
Qudian Inc. released unaudited financial results for Q4 2024 and full year 2024 in China.
news.summary: In Xiamen, China, on March 20, 2025, Qudian Inc. disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter and full year that concluded on December 31, 2024. Qudian, a leading consumer-focused tech firm in China, shared its Fourth Quarter 2024 financial outcomes. The company, listed on NYSE as QD, revealed significant figures but did not disclose specifics.

news.headline: 24/7 Software releases GlobalCommand for GSOCs, offering rapid, scalable implementation for better security ops.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Boca Raton, Florida, 24/7 Software introduced GlobalCommand, a revolutionary platform transforming Global Security Operations Centers (GSOCs). 24/7 Software is a prominent provider of operations management software for venues and large organizations worldwide. GlobalCommand promises to redefine GSOC operations with its innovative features.

Aurora Mobile and ZANROO partner to boost AI innovation in Southeast Asia, targeting regional adoption through joint efforts.
news.summary: Shenzhen, China - On March 20, 2025, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG), a prominent provider of customer engagement and marketing technology services in China, revealed a new strategic partnership. The company's enterprise AI agent platform, GPTBots.ai, has joined forces with ZANROO MALAYSIA SDN. BHD., a rapidly expanding marketing technology firm in Southeast Asia. The collaboration aims to boost the utilization of AI solutions in the region through cooperative business scenario strategies, thematic campaigns, and joint branding ventures. This partnership signifies a key move towards advancing AI technology adoption in the Southeast Asian market.

news.headline: Details of share buyback transactions for March 13-19, 2025 announced with no. of shares repurchased.
SNB's Vice Chairman: Scenario for global economy subject to high uncertainty.
Coinbase holds 11.42% of all staked Ether, with 3.84 million ETH worth $6.8B. Validator uptime and participation rate at 99.75%. ETH surges past $2,000 on March 20.
news.summary: Coinbase's report revealed that it is the biggest node operator for Ethereum, holding 11.42% of the total staked Ether in the blockchain network, totaling 3.84 million ETH valued at $6.8 billion. This stake makes Coinbase the largest node operator in the network. The exchange exceeded its target for validator uptime at 99.75% and also had a similar figure for participation rate, outperforming the network average. Coinbase attributed this success to an upgrade implemented in 2024. The exchange operates validators in Japan, Singapore, Ireland, Germany, and Hong Kong to maintain a decentralized Ethereum blockchain. Additionally, on March 20, Ether surged above $2k, hitting a weekly high of $2,060.73 with a daily trading volume of $17.4 billion.

news.headline: Bybit: 88% of $1.4B stolen crypto still traceable after hack. Lazarus Group suspected. CEO offers $2.2M for fund recovery. Analysts warn of vulnerabilities.
news.summary: On February 21, Bybit experienced the largest hack in history, losing over $1.4 billion in liquid-staked Ether and other assets. Blockchain investigators, including Arkham Intelligence, identified North Korea’s Lazarus Group as the likely culprit. Despite their efforts, 88% of the stolen funds remain traceable, with 86.29% converted into 12,836 BTC across 9,117 wallets. Bybit has awarded $2.2 million to bounty hunters for relevant information and is offering 10% of recovered funds as a bounty. The hack, facilitated through THORChain, highlights the vulnerability of even well-secured exchanges to sophisticated cyberattacks. This incident surpasses the Poly Network hack, marking it as the largest crypto exchange breach to date.

news.headline: Iran Foreign Minister Araqchi: Trump tter is more a threat but also claims there are opportunities, tehran will contemplate both - Fars News.

Cryptocurrency exchanges use PoR audits with Merkle trees and ZK-proofs for transparency. Basel III inspires capital reserve regulations in traditional banking. Coinbase's cbBTC employs PoR to ensure 1:1 backing by Bitcoin. PoR audits confirm assets but not liabilities, enhancing exchange transparency. Limitations include lack of real-time oversight and reliance on third-party auditors. PoR is a key step for financial accountability in the crypto industry.
news.summary: Proof-of-reserves (PoR) audits are cryptographic verifications increasingly used by cryptocurrency exchanges to ensure they have enough assets to cover customer deposits, enhancing transparency and security. While similar to capital reserves in traditional banking, PoR audits lack the ability to assess liabilities, potentially misleading users about an exchange's solvency. Regulatory measures like the Basel III framework in traditional finance ensure financial institutions maintain capital reserves for stability. PoR audits use methods like Merkle trees and zero-knowledge proofs to verify asset holdings, but limitations exist in proving solvency and real-time oversight. Coinbase's cbBTC token utilizes PoR to confirm 1:1 Bitcoin reserves, ensuring trust and security for users. While PoR is a step in the right direction, it has limitations such as exclusion of liabilities and reliance on third-party auditors, necessitating ongoing improvements for enhanced transparency and reliability in the cryptocurrency industry.

Earnings on 20/03/2025: Multiple companies reporting before the bell projected to report various earnings.
news.summary: Before the market bell, multiple companies are set to release their earnings reports. Academy Sports (ASO) is projected to post earnings of $1.82 per share on revenue of $1.68 billion. Jabil (JBL) is estimated to announce earnings of $1.83 per share with revenue of $6.40 billion. Mogo (MOGO) is anticipated to report a loss of $0.08 per share on revenue of $12.77 million. These are just a few of the companies expected to share their quarterly financial updates.

Mindsprint names Suresh Sundararajan as CEO to drive transformation with AI solutions. Singapore, Mar 20, 2025.
news.summary: Mindsprint has named Suresh Sundararajan as its new CEO, aiming to drive the company's evolution with AI-driven innovations and key collaborations. The Singapore-based digital solutions firm specializes in serving international businesses. The appointment was made known on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Versameb AG receives first patent in China for "Signal Peptide with Heterologous Protein" in RNA therapeutics.
news.summary: Versameb AG, a biotech company based in Basel, Switzerland, revealed on March 20, 2025, that they have been granted the Notice of Allowance for their initial Composition of Matter patent in China. This patent marks a significant development for Versameb as they work towards revolutionizing RNA therapeutics for addressing unmet medical necessities. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to advancing in the clinical stage realm.

news.headline: Dan Menichella and Jo Brewer, PhD join Infinitopes as Non-Executive Directors to advance precision immunotherapies.
news.summary: Industry innovators Dan Menichella and Jo Brewer, PhD were appointed as Non-Executive Directors, leveraging their expertise in strategy, immuno-oncology science implementation from research to approval, significant partnerships, collaborations, and biotech expansion. Their addition aims to boost the progress of proof-of-concept, contributing invaluable insights to the sector.

news.headline: Domain Therapeutics reveals DT-9046, a novel oral drug for inflammatory diseases, targeting PAR2. Unique mechanism may treat multiple diseases.
news.summary: DT-9046, a groundbreaking biased negative allosteric modulator of PAR2, has emerged as a game-changing asset with significant implications for various inflammatory conditions. With a distinctive mechanism of action, this first-in-class drug has the potential to profoundly influence inflammation, tissue damage, and pain management. Developed in Strasbourg, France, DT-9046 shows promise in revolutionizing treatment strategies for inflammatory diseases.

news.headline: Global Medical Radioisotopes Market to reach USD 1382 Million by 2034, with a 6.34% CAGR. Increased demand fueled by nuclear medicine applications, with the US, Canada, and Germany as key players. Asia-Pacific region to see fastest growth. Significant advances in isotope production technologies noted.
news.summary: The article discusses the findings of a new research report by Custom Market Insights on the Medical Radioisotopes Market. In 2024, the market size was approximately USD 745 million and is expected to reach USD 803 million in 2025 and projected to hit USD 1382 million by 2034 with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 6.34%. The demand for medical radioisotopes is driven by applications in diagnostics and therapeutics, with Tc-99m being the most used isotope. Factors such as the expansion of nuclear medicine infrastructure, government investments, and advancements in technology are propelling market growth. Key players influencing the market include Lantheus Holdings, Cardinal Health, and NorthStar Medical Radioisotopes. The report also highlights the development of cyclotron-based methods for isotope production by companies like ARTMS and research on Actinium-225 production for cancer therapy. While North America dominates the market currently, Asia-Pacific is expected to be the fastest-growing market due to rising adoption of nuclear medicine and growing healthcare expenditure. The competitive landscape is evolving with strategic collaborations and product launches. Key figures: market size in 2024 - USD 745 million, 2025 - USD 803 million, projected 2034 - USD 1382 million, CAGR - 6.34%.
